title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Massive Restaurants - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Massive Restaurants - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Massive Restaurants are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Chennai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Massive Restaurants:
Massive Restaurants is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in OTA Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Massive Restaurants!
